ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the financial instrument being traded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the trading period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the trading period */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades executed */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount traded */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Last updated time of the trade record */,
  "market_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the market where the trade occurred */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the trading currency to a base currency */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order associated with the trade */,
  "broker_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the broker facilitating the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., stock, cryptocurrency) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number for the instrument */,
  "isin_country" TEXT /* Country of the ISIN */,
  "isin_issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the ISIN */,
  "isin_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the ISIN */,
  "instrument_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the financial instrument */,
  "market_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the market where the instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., basic, advanced, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the session during which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument the alert is related to */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, canceled) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the alert is active (e.g., 1 hour, 1 day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "market_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the market where the session occurred */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades in the session */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded in the session */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount traded in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "related_instruments" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of instruments related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the notification is sent (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  "notification_details" TEXT /* Detailed message content of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
